summary: AtBat subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user has AtBat entitlement
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is archived

AtBat entitlements = MLBAUDIO, IPHONEATBAT, ANDROIDATBAT, SUBSCRIBERVOD

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal displays
AND the user will see the ESPN feed button with a lock icon
AND a blackout message does not display
AND the user cannot playback the feed
AND the user is taken to the paywall/subscriptions page after selecting the feed button
